title: Weintraub Traub Tracy & Virk Cra's LLP ransomware incident

victim.name: Weintraub Traub Tracy & Virk Cra's LLP

extortion.description: We have data from Piaty Müller-Mezin Schoeller Rechtsanwälte GmbH, payment and tax records, employee and client documents, as well as projects and developments, and personal correspondence with clients.
